calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-13-2007 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-13-2007 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the the Presiding Judge Dept. for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Pappina Thompson.
Plaintiff: Nasir Patel, present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
No appearance by the Defendant: Alberto Carlos santiago.
Exhibit-1 Notice to pay or quit-----------ID/EVID.
Exhibit-2 Proof of Service-----------ID/EVID.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant as follows:
Rental agrement is canceled.
Plaintiff waived money judgment, and is entitled to possession only for the premises located at 554 Broadway St., #32, San Francisco.
Plaintiff to prepare Judgment for signature and stipulated for the return of the exhibits.

Nov. 14, 2007
Judgment signed by Comm. Kaplan.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-08-2007 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Nasir Patel, Plaintiff In Pro Per present. Defendant is not present this date.

There being no appearance by Defendant this date, settlement conference is vacated. Trial date remains.

Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk Kay Peek, not reported (218)
